name: 3rd_messagin_application
description: //  building this  for  capstone  device  will  write  desc  later

scripts.build: npm ci --include=dev --prefix backend && npm ci --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.check: npm run prisma:validate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm test --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
